allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; Start=$p.StartTime } } | Format-List } else { "Nothing listening on 3000" })
